articles.title: IS SECURITY A COST CENTER OR A REVENUE GENERATOR?
articles.summary: Many software leaders still see security as a hassle, a box-ticking exercise, or a resource sink. But things are changing fast. A new ebook by Vanta

articles.title: WELLBEING AT WORK IS ABOUT FEELING CONNECTED
articles.summary: Whether hybrid, remote, or fully in-office, the leading indicator of performance and reduced instances of burnout is how connected an employee feels to the broader organization. This involves more access to information and resources, time to do work, and feedback from peers and managers.

articles.title: KLAVIYO FILES FOR AN IPO
articles.summary: At almost $600m ARR, still growing at 57% YoY, and profitable for the last 6 months, could Klaviyo be the first SaaS IPO out of the pandemic gates that sets the path for others?

articles.title: INSTACART FILES FOR AN IPO
articles.summary: Grocery delivery giant Instacart has filed to go public in what is the first significant venture-backed tech IPO since December 2021.

articles.title: EMBRACING FAILURE
articles.summary: Founders are increasingly being more open with their failures, and that’s a good thing. It shows that building startups and pursuing innovation is all about experimenting and taking shots on goal. Failures aren’t failures, simply attempts.

articles.title: YOU NEED A CO-FOUNDER
articles.summary: Although there’s been some successful solo founders, you’ll often hear that you need a co-founder in a complimentary domain in order to build a truly great startup. But what is a co-founder? It’s really just a title, someone you trust to run the company in your absence. It doesn’t need to be someone with equal equity as you.

articles.title: THE ENGINEERING EXECUTIVE’S ROLE IN HIRING
articles.summary: A comprehensive dive into the components of an effective hiring process for technical roles. Build a scalable system, train your hiring managers, set benchmarks and reporting windows with your recruiting team, and determine compensation levels before you kick off the hiring process.

articles.title: POOZLE
articles.summary: Poozle is an open-source single API for Product Integrations.

articles.title: AROUND THE WORLD IN 21 DAYS
articles.summary: Our expectations of how people use technology and the reality of that usage can often be different. Stay close to your users.

articles.title: HOW TO GET SOMEONE ON YOUR PODCAST
articles.summary: Make it as easy as humanly possible for them to say yes, schedule, do the prep, and show up.

articles.title: IS REPORTING CASH-ON-HAND TO YOUR INVESTORS NOW A RED FLAG?
articles.summary: Over the last 18 months, a lot of my personal portfolio companies started to put their cash-on-hand status right at the top of their investor update. It showed that month-month they were being cautious with cash, but it also often meant they weren’t really growing all that much. As the macro improved a little, is now the time to start deploying capital to build value?

articles.title: PRACTICE SPEAKING UP
articles.summary: The imaginary cost of speaking up is often less than the real cost.

articles.title: FEWER MEETINGS MEANS YOU HAVE TO SHOW MORE IMPACT
articles.summary: If you’re declining meetings to focus on other things, eventually you’re going to have to show that this tradeoff meant something.
